1695800.name: We Hidden
1695800.description:
A 2D Hide and Seek game with cute chameleons!. These little guys are always up something so don't let that cute face fool you. Camouflage is one of their specialities. Their are two teams. Hiders and Seekers. The Hiders must stay hidden and not get tagged out while the countdown is active. The Seeker will try to tag everyone playing. But theres huge catch! The seeker has special ability that wont make it easy to survive the match. As a Hider you can choose to level up and gain experience. Each chameleon is assigned specific role. You can choose to complete the job and earn money or stay hidden through out the match.

 

The biome you decide to play in is filled with mysterious vegetation and relics. The chameleon uses their environment to the best of their ability to stay hidden in such dangerous surroundings.

SEEKER ABILITIES:

INVISIBILITY

CHROMA COPY

MAGNIFY

VARIATIONS TO PLAY

BASIC:

HOMEBASE:

JAILBREAK:

MAN_HUNT
1695800.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文
